summary: Completed comprehensive testing of My Files page view/download functionality. All backend endpoints working correctly (12/13 tests passed, 1 skipped). Frontend UI verified with all file types displaying correct buttons. Zanzibar and Mainland lesson views show proper bilingual table format. No print/download buttons inside view modals.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/lessons returns lessons list (200)
Backend: GET /api/lessons/{id}/view returns Zanzibar HTML with bilingual tables (ANDALIO LA SOMO, HATUA/STEPS, MUDA/TIME, VITENDO VYA KUFUNDISHIA)
Backend: GET /api/lessons/{id}/view returns Mainland HTML with 4 stages (Introduction, Building New Knowledge, Design, Realisation)
Backend: GET /api/lessons/{id}/export returns .doc file with Content-Type: application/msword
Backend: GET /api/templates returns templates list (200)
Backend: GET /api/templates/{id}/view returns rendered HTML with images, no buttons
Backend: GET /api/templates/{id}/export returns .doc file with correct headers
Backend: GET /api/uploads excludes file_data field from listing (performance fix)
Backend: GET /api/uploads/{id}/download returns actual file with correct content-type
Backend: GET /api/dictations returns dictations list (200)
Backend: GET /api/dictations/{id}/download returns audio/mpeg MP3 file via TTS API
Backend: GET /api/schemes returns schemes list (200)
Frontend: My Files page loads with stats cards (Lessons, Schemes, Notes, Dictations, Templates, Uploads)
Frontend: Lesson cards have Share, View, Download buttons
Frontend: Template cards have Share, View, Download buttons
Frontend: Dictation cards have Share, Play, Download buttons
Frontend: Upload cards have Share, Download buttons
Frontend: Lesson View modal opens with iframe containing bilingual table
Frontend: Template View modal opens with rendered content (questions, images)
Frontend: View modal iframe has NO print/download buttons inside
Frontend: Mainland lesson view shows all 4 stages (Introduction, Building New Knowledge, Design, Realisation)

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 passed, 1 skipped - no schemes in test data)

context_for_next_testing_agent: My Files view/download functionality fully tested and working. All file types (lessons, templates, dictations, uploads) have correct buttons. Zanzibar lessons show bilingual table format with ANDALIO LA SOMO header. Mainland lessons show 4 stages (Introduction, Building New Knowledge, Design, Realisation). View modals use iframe with no print/download buttons inside. Dictation download uses TTS API to generate MP3. Upload download returns actual file content.

zanzibar_lesson_view.enrollment_table: DAY & DATE / SIKU & TAREHE, SESSION / MKONDO, CLASS / DARASA, PERIODS / VIPINDI, TIME / MUDA, ENROLLED / PRESENT / WALIOANDIKISHWA / WALIOHUDHURIA
zanzibar_lesson_view.lesson_development: STEPS / HATUA, TIME / MUDA, TEACHING ACTIVITIES / VITENDO VYA KUFUNDISHIA, LEARNING ACTIVITIES / VITENDO VYA KUJIFUNZIA, ASSESSMENT / TATHMINI

stages: 2. BUILDING NEW KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS / KUJENGA MAARIFA MAPYA NA UJUZI
